subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! Your letter was received, and your lamentation, cry and passionate plea produced a profound effect [3.5s]... ...In this day the duty of everyone, whether man or woman, is to teach the Cause. In America, the women have outdone the men in this regard and have taken the lead in this field
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه رسید و فریاد و فغان و ضجیج و اجیج تاثیر شدید نمود گمان
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
